docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00); REMARKS: PER THE CURRENT TENANT, SHE SAID HER FIRST NAME IS IRENE BUT WITH A DIFFERENT LAST NAME AND SHOWED HER PASSPORT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF DHARNI, JUSTINE AS TO DEFENDANT ARBIV, IRENE AKA IRENE GUMENICK
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,640.00 *ADDING AKA TO DEFENDANT'S NAME* FILED BY DHARNI, JUSTINE AS TO DEFENDANT ARBIV, IRENE AKA IRENE GUMENICK

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, JUSTINE DHARNI. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT IRENE ARBIV. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FILED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
TRIAL RESET TO JUL-08-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUN-02-2022 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FILED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,640.00 FILED BY DHARNI, JUSTINE AS TO DEFENDANT ARBIV, IRENE AKA IRENE GUMENICK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-02-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-08-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-24-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JUSTINE DHARNI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IRENE ARBIV AKA IRENE GUMENICK IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE IS FILED. PLAINTIFF PRESENTED DOCUMENTATION OF THE SHERIFF'S SERVICE. THE COURT VOIR DIRED THE DEFENDANT AND FOUND SERVICE WAS IMPROPER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-24-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-14-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JUSTINE DHARNI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IRENE ARBIV IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT / D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
